params.name: Maze Diagrams
params.description: Advisor Zhuge learned the Art of War and created this diagram. It contains eight formations: Overlaying Sky, Loading Ground, Blowing Wind, Hanging Cloud, Flying Dragon, Tiger Wing, Flying Bird, and Coiling Snake. Each corresponds to the method of attack and defense in different situations.
params.ss1: When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +3%
